This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] cos float32 1D tensor / async
  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "NotSupportedError: The operator (cos) is not supported."

  promise_test: Unhandled rejection with value: object "NotSupportedError: The operator (cos) is not supported."
